query_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts = 1

part_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts = 1

metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts = 1

asynchronous_metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts = 1

processors_profile_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts = 1

text_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts = 1
